text: {"claims":[{"statement":"University of Lagos was established in 1962.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [Universities and colleges established in 1962]","entailment":"The category label indicates that the University of Lagos belongs to the group of institutions founded in 1962, thereby asserting its establishment year.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"University of Lagos is a public university in Nigeria.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [Public universities in Nigeria]","entailment":"The category label classifies the University of Lagos as part of the set of public universities located in Nigeria, asserting its public status and national location.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"University of Lagos is a business school in Lagos.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [Business schools in Lagos]","entailment":"The category label places the University of Lagos within the group of business schools situated in Lagos, indicating that it offers business education in that city.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"}]}
